appearance.scanline_hint: Animated scan line overlay across the interface

backup.title: Backup Settings
backup.advanced_warning: ⚠️ These settings do not need to be changed under normal circumstances. Only modify them if you know what you are doing — incorrect paths can break backups and restores.
backup.appdata_path_hint: Default source path for new Appdata jobs (default: /unraid/user/appdata)
backup.flash_source_hint: Default path for flash drive backups (default: /unraid/boot)

theme.label: Color Theme
theme.description: Choose a color theme for the interface

account.title: Account
account.password_change_confirm_message: The current password will become invalid.

system.title: System
system.log_retention_hint: Logs older than this number of days are automatically deleted at 04:00.

helbackup.title: HELBACKUP Restore
helbackup.restore_hint: Upload a helbackup-export.tar.gz (or .gpg) from a HELBACKUP Sicherung job to restore all jobs, targets, backup records and SSH keys on a fresh installation.
helbackup.restore_warning: This will replace all current data and restart the container. Only use on a fresh or broken installation.
helbackup.encryption_password_hint: Password used when the backup was created
helbackup.restore_restarting: Container is restarting — you will be redirected to the login page in a few seconds.
